1874590.name: RPG Maker MZ - City Exterior Tileset
1874590.description:
Make your cities more vivid than ever!
This is an assortment of useful exterior objects to make your city feel lively and interesting!
Mob NPC’s breathe vapors, the music of a festival, the hunch of an upcoming incident…
Why not add a touch of expressive, rich colors to your city?

*******************************************
Tiles: 4 files
Sample projects: 1
*******************************************

・This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series ONLY
・OK to be used in Commercial projects made in RPG Maker
・You may modify some of the assets (but not redistribute them) for your own game use only.
・All copyrights, neighboring rights, and all other rights to this material belong to the creator or a third party authorized by the creator.
